text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's gotten her groove back! But which of them will be
blessed by the goddess of victory?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wahaaah! You couldn't hit a barn with that aim! Hraaah! Take thiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! Get back here! How about this then!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen unleashes a flurry of attacks! Can Gold Ship evade
them all?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ho! Ha! Kyaaah! No sweat! Come on, that all you got?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm empty? Where's the refill station?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Trying to run now?! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Goooo! Yeah! Go, go, go!
Waaah! Get out of there! Keep running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You think you can take me on in a battle of stamina? Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Incredible speed! Mejiro McQueen has broken away in an instant!
She's already back with a refilled water cartridge!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Not good enough! I'm going to win!)

text_block_list.name: McQueen & Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaaah!
Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The turbulent final match is over. And as the sun sets, the barbeque
celebration begins.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! That sauce smells great! It looks really good!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hmm. ♪ Hm! ...Mmm hm hmm!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, still being quiet like you promised? Hehehe, too bad you didn't
win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Behaving yourself doesn't mean you can't speak. Though if I must
say...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's become so peaceful without you making a fuss like normal. Haha! I
think I'll finally be able to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, what now? I'll have no complaints from you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hmm! Hmhmm ...Mhm, hm, hm, hmmm hm hm!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I didn't understand a bit of that... Hey, what do you have there? No! I
don't want any! Don't touch my food with that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Maruzen. So this is where you were. Mind if I stand here with
you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, go right ahead! You're very welcome. Look, isn't the sunset
beautiful? ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wooow... It really is! Beautiful, and such stunning colors... It kind of
makes me sad that today's almost over.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the more fun we have, the quicker time flies by... I have to say,
I'm a teensy bit sad too.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This was all so... I mean, I couldn't even have imagined how much fun
this would be.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You really enjoyed it then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I sure did! You were so amazing in our water gun fight, Chiyo! I was
struggling so hard my face must've been white with fear!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Having someone who could stand up and give me a serious
challenge... made me so happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... This turned out to be the best summer because of you.
I'm never going to forget this experience!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... No! I should be thanking you! Getting to participate together was just such a blast!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget this either! The way you really put your heart into our
fight, or the excitement this summer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm completely exhausted... But, hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You don't have to keep this vow of silence, you know?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Really? Guess we can talk about the squid ministers' rebellion
then! Their unrestrained ambition led them to try to take the throne—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Noisy nonsense is still forbidden. Just speak about normal things. It's
outright impossible trying to understand you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But this time... I realized something about you. I suppose even you
have some good qualities.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oho? So you finally see how amazing I really am? Okay, lay it on me.
Keep those compliments coming!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You shouldn't be so full of yourself. But... you're right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Though I say this sparingly... you have my gratitude. There was some
hardship involved, but I'm glad to have played with you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoooa! You feeling okay? One minute you're all dejected,
but now I don't know what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm perfectly fine. I was only saying what's on my mind. Weren't you
the one who was being unusually persistent?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was only like that 'cause you looked so dang determined to not have
fun! All that observing I did, and you didn't molt or hibernate once.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seeing someone like that just makes me want to poke 'em. It's no fun
to just leave you alone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What kind of reason is that? Can you at least try to understand what
it's like to be the one poked?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(But... doesn't that mean she was paying attention to me because
something seemed off?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(If she hadn't suddenly said she was bored... If I hadn't lost it with her
attitude... I'd probably still be...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, how silly. It's useless trying to reason what your true intentions ever are.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you just see that sea monster?! We should go exchange
business cards—oh, right. I'm supposed to keep it down...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You only have to stay quiet until the sun finishes setting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But don't budge until then. Stay here, just like this...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You sure that's long enough? You won after all. There's no
telling what I'll get up to after this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That's fine... It's summer after all!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's summer got to do with it? Geez, now I'm talking like you!
You're good... Really good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, hey, stop moving! Ahahaha!
